$comment: Layer B selection cases for COMPOUND vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image. Covers the TEST BEFORE zero-iteration term (where a do-while translation runs once too often), a single year, a HALF_UP half-cent accrual, a multi-year compounding path, and the PIC 9(7)V99 wrap region.

legacy.label: COBOL 85 COMPOUND (GnuCOBOL via harness image legacymind/legacy-compound)
